hooks.command: cmux set-status agent 'Claude ready' --icon brain --color '#F97316' 2>/dev/null; true
cmux set-status agent 'Done' --icon checkmark.circle --color '#22C55E' 2>/dev/null; cmux notify --title 'Claude Code' --body 'Task complete' 2>/dev/null; true
cmux notify --title 'Claude Code' --body 'Needs attention' 2>/dev/null; cmux set-status agent 'Waiting' --icon questionmark.circle --color '#A855F7' 2>/dev/null; true
